name: DEFENSE TECHNOLOGIES INTERNATIONAL CORP.
summary: PART I Defense Technologies International Corp. (the Company) was incorporated in the State of Delaware on May 27, 1998. Effective June 15, 2016, the Company changed its name from Canyon Gold Corp. to Defense Technologies International Corp. to represent the Companys expansion goals more fully into the advanced technology sector. Our principal executive office is located at 2683 Via De La Ville Suite G418, Del Mar CA 92014 147, telephone (1-800) 520-9485. Additional office space is subleased fro...
